title: SALES REPRESENTATIVE / EXECUTIVE
description:
What You’ll Do

  • Be the frontline ambassador for reputable partner brands at events and roadshows

  • Confidently engage customers and clearly communicate how the brand’s services improve their lives

  • Turn meaningful conversations into successful sign-ups and smooth onboardings

  • Collaborate with a motivated, performance-driven team to execute campaigns and exceed targets

  • Create positive, memorable customer experiences that build long-term trust and brand loyalty

Why You’ll Want This Role

  • Weekly payouts every Friday – fast, transparent, and reliable income

  • No experience needed – full one-to-one training, proven scripts, and hands-on coaching provided

  • A high-energy, supportive team culture where effort is recognised and rewarded

  • Referral incentives – earn extra by bringing friends into the team

  • Regular team bonding and social events (KBBQ, hotpot, laser tag, KTV, and more)

  • Exclusive gym membership to support your health, confidence, and lifestyle

  • Clear pathways to leadership roles, career advancement, and overseas exposure

This is not just a job. Many team members start on the ground and advance into team lead, trainer, or management roles based purely on performance—not seniority.

Who Excels Here

  • You enjoy meeting new people and building rapport quickly

  • You have a positive, coachable mindset and are eager to learn

  • You want strong income and real personal growth, not just a routine role

  • You are motivated, disciplined, and goal-oriented

Basic Requirements

  • Aged 18 years and above

  • Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident (PR)

  • Minimum 3-month commitment

  • Able to work 5–6 days per week (day shifts)

postedCompany.description:
We are a results-driven outsourced sales and marketing company that partners with reputable brands to accelerate customer acquisition, market expansion, and revenue growth. By deploying highly trained, performance-focused teams, we act as a seamless extension of our clients’ sales operations.

What We Do

We specialise in direct sales, field marketing, and customer acquisition, executing high-impact campaigns through events, roadshows, and face-to-face engagements. Our approach combines structured training, data-driven performance management, and consistent on-ground execution to deliver measurable results for our partners.


Our People & Culture

We invest heavily in people development. Team members receive continuous coaching, leadership training, and clear career progression opportunities. High performers are recognised through incentives, leadership roles, and overseas exposure, creating a culture that rewards ambition, discipline, and results.

Our Mission

To help brands grow efficiently while developing top-tier sales professionals through structured systems, real-world experience, and performance-based advancement.
postedCompany.name: STALLIONSWORK
